diagrams.title: Relational Algebra Operations Classification
diagrams.description: Shows basic operations vs derived operations in relational algebra
elements: Basic: Selection (σ), Projection (π), Union (∪), Difference (−), Cartesian Product (×), Rename (ρ)
Derived: Intersection (∩), Natural Join (⋈), Theta Join (⋈θ), Division (÷), Equijoin, Outer Joins

diagrams.title: Selection vs Projection Visual
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of Selection (row filtering) vs Projection (column selection)
diagrams.purpose: Clear distinction between row and column operations

diagrams.title: Natural Join Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step execution of Natural Join using basic operations

diagrams.title: Join Types Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Inner Join, Left, Right, and Full Outer Joins
elements: Left: All left + matching right + NULL for non-matching
Right: NULL for non-matching + matching left + all right
Full: All rows from both + NULL where no match
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different join semantics and results
